= Index Page

== Overview

Valid fragment references:

* xref:target.adoc#_first_section[First Section]
* xref:target.adoc#custom-anchor[Custom Anchor]
* xref:target.adoc#shorthand-id[Shorthand]
* xref:target.adoc#inline-anchor[Inline]

Invalid fragment references:

* xref:target.adoc#nonexistent-section[Missing Section]
* xref:target.adoc#_typo_section[Typo Section]
